historical_context: An asteroid impact with massive kinetic energy exceeding 1.0e21 Joules. This is a planet-killer class event. It causes an immediate global firestorm, mega-tsunamis, and a subsequent impact winter that blocks out the sun, similar to the Chicxulub impactor that wiped out the dinosaurs.

An asteroid impact with kinetic energy around 6.0e16 Joules (approx 15 megatons). This causes massive regional destruction, capable of flattening entire metropolitan areas or thousands of square miles of forest, similar to the Tunguska event in Siberia. Global climate is unaffected, but local devastation is absolute.
